# Community Content Skill

## Purpose

Create educational/community-facing content grounded in repo knowledge.

## When To Use

- blog/social post drafts
- learning summaries
- release highlights with technical grounding

## Workflow

1. Extract 3-5 validated insights.
2. Tailor narrative to audience level.
3. Produce concise draft and optional extended version.

## Guardrails

- Avoid unverifiable claims.
- Prefer clarity and practical takeaways.
